name: Carlyss Gym
description: Carlyss Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sulphur, LA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Free for Sulphur residents, non-residents pay a $5 per day fee.

name: Enos Derbonne Sports Complex
description: Enos Derbonne Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lake Charles, LA. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Game2Life
description:
If you have friends that want to come but don’t play pickleball we have a full-service restaurant and bar located upstairs overlooking the courts! We have 10 + screens with the games on them nightly! We also offer yard games such as Cornhole, Washers, Darts, Carpet Ball, and Ping Pong which are all located on the patio near the axe cages.

We do clinics toward the end of every month! Follow on social media for dates and times on these! Clinics can be booked via game2life.checkfront.com/reserve

Memberships now available!
We have seasonal leagues. Follow our socials for more information!

Join our GroupMe at  https://groupme.com/join_group/91686177/cNDj8NOT

We have 4 championship size courts with plenty of seating and shade!

name: Golden Nugget Lake Charles
description:
Pickleball Court Rules
For pickleball only.
Bikes, skateboards, skates, lawn chairs, glass containers, and pets are not allowed.
Any objects that may damage the court surface are not allowed.
Outside food and beverages are not permitted.
Sitting or leaning on the nets is strictly prohibited.
Appropriate soft soled footwear only.
Trash and other debris should be placed in provided trash receptacles.
Children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult.
Players assume all responsibility.
Courts are reserved by the hour; extra time will be billed to guest.
fees: Fee required — Monday - Friday |  8am-5pm $25/hr  Monday - Friday |  5pm-10pm $40/hr  Saturday - Sunday | 8am-5pm $40/hr  Paddles and balls are available for rental at The Retail Hut at H20.  Paddle r

name: Kyle Street Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Kyle Street Gym in Sulphur, LA! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Free for Sulphur residents, non-residents pay a $5 per day fee.

name: McMurray Park
description: McMurray Park is a place to play pickleball in Sulphur, LA. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Moss Bluff Recreation
description: Moss Bluff Recreation is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lake Charles, LA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: North Beach Lake Charles
description: Easily accessible right off I-10, North Beach  is an ideal location for pickleball players of all skill levels. This fantastic spot is perfect for families and groups looking to enjoy a game while taking in stunning waterfront views. It’s the ultimate destination for visitors to unwind by the water, relax on the sand, soak in breathtaking scenery, and stay active with a fun and competitive match on the courts. North Beach offers the perfect combination of relaxation and excitement, making it a must-visit for anyone in Southwest Louisiana!

name: South Beach Sports Bar & Grill
description: South Beach  offers two great options for enjoying pickleball. Groups looking for a dedicated space can book private court rentals by the hour, while individuals or pairs can join the action through the Open Play option. With a commitment to growing the pickleball community, South Beach strives to provide an enjoyable experience for all players. South Beach also offers multiple leagues, tournaments, and events. Plus, balls and paddles are available for rent, making it easy for everyone to get in the game!

name: SPAR Recreation & Aquatic Center
description: Come play pickleball at SPAR Recreation & Aquatic Center in Sulphur, LA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and locker rooms. The courts are free.

name: Trinity Baptist Church
description: Trinity Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Lake Charles, LA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Vinton Ward 7 Recreation Center
description: Vinton Ward 7 Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Vinton, LA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
